item.name: Text 8
item.text: Change the background color of your scene in the Design mode of the inspector on the right (feel free to use the _COLORS artboard for inspo!).

item.name: Text 3
item.text: Other ideas: personalize your text, combine with different scenes from other templates

item.name: Text 8
item.text: Copy the animated stickers you like from the artboard on the right and paste them onto your main scene. You can change when they appear by dragging the animations left or right on the timeline.

item.name: Text 8
item.text: In the Photos group, under Elements -> Picture XX, replace the images with your own by selecting it and clicking Replace Media on the right.

item.name: Text 8
item.text: Once you're happy with your animation, click Export in the top right corner and choose your export format (we recommend mp4 or GIF). Don't forget to share the result on social media using the hashtag #Config2025!
